prestazioni: K24Z7 (2.4L i-VTEC) engine swap with a custom-built 88mm forged crankshaft from Manley Performance, paired with JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (12.5:1 compression) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods for high-RPM durability

Full bolt-on turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Full Race Motorsports, mated to a PRL Motorsports intercooler core (4.5x12x24 inches) and Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate

Custom Hondata KPro V4 ECU tune with ethanol flex-fuel capability, optimized for E85 with a 22 psi peak boost target, featuring a 12,000 RPM rev limiter, aggressive cam timing (via K-Tuned adjustable cam gears), and a 4-2-1 stainless steel header by Hytech Exhaust
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-Series widebody conversion kit (2016-2021 Civic Si-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Seibon Carbon fiber hood (vented, 5 lbs weight reduction) and a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem-style)

OEM+ aggressive stance with BC Racing BR coilovers (Type RM, 8kg front/10kg rear spring rates) and Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)

Full interior carbon fiber upgrade including a Takata Drift II 4-point harness bar (bolt-in, Civic Si-specific), Bride Zeta III bucket seats (custom red Alcantara with black stitching), and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede, quick-release hub)
